function.name: promoteLearnedProcedureToSkill
function.description: Promote a previously learned operation shortcut into an Agent Skills style SKILL.md package. Use only when the user asks to turn a learned procedure into a reusable skill.

ProcedureText.description: The exact learned procedure text, used when ProcedureId is unavailable.

SkillName.description: Optional skill name. If omitted, a safe name is derived from the procedure.

Description.description: Optional skill description. If omitted, one is derived from the procedure trigger.

Enabled.description: Whether the created skill should be enabled. Defaults to true.
